creator: stievenard.david@gmail.com
text:
tested on the last version of freebsd 10.2 available at this date

this appends
- after installation of samba 4.3.3
- after provisioning the domain
- after registering a windows workstation in that domain
- in dns MMC (needed the installation of the microsoft RSAT tools) : there is no records for that workstation that joined the domain

: 
tried with package and port in the 4.3 branch -> same result
tried with win7 and win10 -> same result
tried with vm in xencenter and virtualbox -> same result
tried with the package in samba 4.2 branch -> no problem, workstations register in the dns


it's my first bug report and I'm a beginner, so I still can't believe the problem comes from me but I'm out of option and 4.2 next phase for 4.2 is End of Life
https://wiki.samba.org/index.php/Samba_Release_Planning


Contact me if I can do anything to help
dasti
